title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 6: The Great and Venerable Teacher
description: Chapter 6 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 6 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: The True Man of ancient times slept without dreaming and woke without care. He ate without savoring and his breath came from deep inside. The True Man breathes with his heels; the mass of men breathe with their throats.
